name: Annual Gift Tax Exclusion

eligibility.description: Available to any donor making a gift of a present interest to a donee; the amount is per-donee and resets annually.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes the first $10,000 (adjusted for inflation, $18,000 for 2024/2025) of gifts of present interests made to any person during the calendar year from the total amount of taxable gifts.
